executive_summary: Today's top VC sourcing signals for 2026-04-20 indicate a strong presence of AI-related ventures, with a majority of the leads emerging from unknown geographies. The India and Southeast Asia split is currently skewed, with only one lead, Srinivas Narayanan, confirmed to be from India, scoring 75 and fitting our archetype of a stealth founder in the AI sector. Our most compelling leads include Srinivas Narayanan, who demonstrates a strong signal, and Rajiv Ayyangar, who, despite an unknown geography, shows promise in the AI Agents space with a score of 45. Overall, these signals suggest a growing trend of AI-focused startups in our target region, with Srinivas Narayanan being a key founder to watch.

persons.name: Srinivas Narayanan
persons.investment_thesis: Srinivas Narayanan, former CTO of OpenAI, is a highly credible individual with deep expertise in AI. His departure from such a prominent company is a strong signal of intent to build something new. Given his background, he is likely to attract significant talent and potentially capital for his next venture in the AI space.

signals.description: [Inc42] OpenAI’s Indian-Origin CTO Srinivas Narayanan Quits

key_strengths: CTO at OpenAI (highly reputable AI company)
risks: Second-time founder status explicitly stated as false (though this could be a first-time founder building something significant)
No company registration or stealth signal provided

persons.name: Rajiv Ayyangar
persons.investment_thesis: Rajiv Ayyangar has launched PangeAI, an agent-driven spatial analysis platform, on Product Hunt. While details are scarce, the focus on AI agents aligns with a hot sector. Further investigation is needed to understand his background and the potential of PangeAI.

persons.investment_thesis: The headline 'In finance, intelligence is human before it is artificial' strongly suggests a seasoned individual with deep domain expertise in Fintech, potentially leveraging AI. This individual is likely building a new venture in a high-growth sector. Further investigation is needed to confirm their background and the nature of their venture.

key_strengths: Intriguing headline suggesting deep domain expertise in finance and AI
Potential focus on a hot sector (AI in Finance)
risks: Founder identity and experience are completely unknown
Lack of corroborating signals (company registration, previous roles)
Geography is unknown, potentially outside our mandate

However, critical information regarding his experience, previous founder status, and location is missing, making it difficult to assess his profile against our mandate.
